personal.name: Pau Ramos
personal.title: Software Developer · Digital Identity & Blockchain
personal.description: Software developer at Telefónica Tech specializing in backend engineering, digital identity, blockchain-based systems, and production-grade web platforms.

paragraphs: I am a software developer at Telefónica Tech focused on building reliable and secure backend systems, blockchain-based identity solutions, and full-stack applications.
I study at 42 Madrid, strengthening low-level problem-solving through advanced C and C++ projects.
I am passionate about secure authentication, verifiable credentials, automation, and real-world digital identity solutions.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Professional experience building APIs, microservices, identity systems and production-ready applications.

education.title: Education
education.description: 42 Madrid · Higher National Diploma in Networked Computer Systems Administration (ASIR)

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Contributor to Telefónica Tech TrustOS ecosystem, multi-wallet VCS platform and enterprise digital identity flows.

projects.title: TrustOS VCS Core API Multi-Provider Credential Infrastructure
projects.description: Production-grade backend powering all verifiable credentials at Telefónica Tech using a provider abstraction layer for PolygonID, Procivis, Identfy and Truvera.

projects.title: TrustOS Verifiable Credentials Platform
projects.description: Full digital identity platform with multi-scenario demos, QR issuance/verification, real-time polling, and multilingual flows.

projects.title: FraudeBec Anti-BEC Fraud Prevention Platform
projects.description: Corporate fraud prevention system using mTLS login, Iberpay/Devengo bank verification, and verifiable credentials for supplier identity.

projects.title: TrustOS PAN Agricultural Commodity Certificate Portal
projects.description: Blockchain-based certification portal for validating agricultural purchase certificates using TrustOS Token API and dedicated smart contracts.

projects.title: Norteverse Gamified Verifiable Credentials Experience
projects.description: Gamified team-building platform using verifiable credentials, QR matching and Procivis integrations.

projects.title: cub3D Raycasting 3D Engine
projects.description: Wolfenstein-style 3D engine built in C using raycasting and MiniLibX, including FOV, wall rendering, textures and collision detection.

projects.title: Minishell UNIX Shell Recreation
projects.description: Custom UNIX shell in C with full lexer/parser pipeline, AST execution, builtins, pipes, redirects, env expansion and signal handling.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Looking to collaborate or discuss a project? Feel free to reach out — I'm always open to connecting.
